_comment: Copy to bench/config.json (gitignored) and fill the api keys (env vars named in providers[*].api_key_env) plus models_under_test. models_under_test is now CROSS-VENDOR (Anthropic + OpenAI + Google + open-weights via an OpenAI-compatible gateway) so the benchmark is not a single-vendor study. Per-model routing lives in model_providers -> providers; the multi-provider client + per-provider request/parse adapters are implemented by aibench_v2_workflow.md Phase B (the stock client only speaks Anthropic until then). The listed ids are FAMILY placeholders: pin the exact DATED snapshot id at run time and record it in results.json's env block (see the paper's closed-model-reproducibility threat). --selftest/--dry-run use the mock model and need no key; --batch refuses while every key is unresolved.
